# Lomada Siva Gangi Reddy — Portfolio

> Personal portfolio of Lomada Siva Gangi Reddy (LSGR), Data Engineering Intern at Boolean Data Systems and aspiring Data Scientist working with Python, SQL, Snowflake, ML, DL, NLP, and Power BI.

The site showcases projects, internships, certifications, research publications, technical skills, and contact details.

## Pages
- [Home](/): Hero, about, internships, projects, skills, certifications, blog, GitHub stats, and contact.

## Optional
- [Sitemap](/sitemap.xml): Machine-readable list of indexable routes.
